golden_categories.name: Standard FQDN Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates fully qualified domain names (FQDN) under default settings.

golden_categories.name: Trailing Dot Option
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with the option to allow trailing dots.

golden_categories.name: Non-TLD Validation
golden_categories.description: Handles FQDN validation when the requirement for a top-level domain (TLD) is disabled.

golden_categories.name: Numeric TLD Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with numeric TLDs when the requirement for a TLD is disabled.

golden_categories.name: Wildcard Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with wildcard domains enabled.

golden_categories.name: Combined Options Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with multiple options enabled, including trailing dots, underscores, and numeric TLDs.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation Behavior
generated_categories.description: Tests the default behavior of the isFQDN validator with no options provided.

generated_categories.name: TLD Requirement Variations
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when the requirement for a top-level domain (TLD) is modified.

generated_categories.name: Underscore Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when underscores are allowed in domain names.

generated_categories.name: Trailing Dot Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when trailing dots are allowed in domain names.

generated_categories.name: Numeric TLD Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when numeric top-level domains (TLDs) are allowed.

generated_categories.name: Wildcard Domain Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when wildcard domains are allowed.

generated_categories.name: Domain Length Restrictions
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when domain length restrictions are ignored.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on validating FQDNs under default settings without additional options.
Both categories address FQDN validation with the option to allow trailing dots.
GC-3 focuses on disabling TLD requirements, while GENC-2 broadly tests TLD requirement variations, including disabling TLDs.
Both categories validate FQDNs with numeric TLDs when the TLD requirement is disabled.
Both categories validate FQDNs with wildcard domains enabled.
GC-6 combines multiple options (trailing dots, underscores, numeric TLDs), but no generated category explicitly tests this combination.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 tests the default behavior of isFQDN, aligning with GC-1's standard FQDN validation.
GENC-2 broadly tests TLD requirement variations, partially aligning with GC-3's focus on disabling TLD requirements.
GENC-3 tests underscore handling, which is not covered by any golden category.
GENC-4 tests trailing dot handling, directly aligning with GC-2's trailing dot option.
GENC-5 tests numeric TLD handling, directly aligning with GC-4's numeric TLD validation.
GENC-6 tests wildcard domain handling, directly aligning with GC-5's wildcard domain validation.
GENC-7 tests domain length restrictions, which is not covered by any golden category.

novel_generated_categories.reason: GENC-3 introduces underscore handling, which is not addressed by any golden category.
GENC-7 introduces domain length restriction handling, which is not addressed by any golden category.

missing_golden_categories.reason: No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
